task: Implement TODO section Claude Code Surface Provenance And Status Clarity one by one until tests pass.
summary: Implemented Claude Code surface provenance and status clarity as explicit wrapper, Stop-hook, native-skill, and MCP surface reporting plus documentation and focused proof coverage.
observations: `datalox status --json` now keeps raw `adapters.claude` compatibility fields and adds `adapters.claude.surfaces.wrapper`, `stopHook`, `nativeSkills`, and `mcp`.
Claude wrapper pre-run enforcement is reported only when `currentSession.activeWrapper` is `claude` and `currentSession.wrapperEnforced` is true.
Claude Stop hook is explicitly reported as post-turn sidecar automation and native skills/MCP are reported as model-chosen guidance surfaces.
Focused adoption, wrapper, and hook tests passed after adding status-surface, wrapper-sentinel, and hook non-enforcement assertions.
